content.content:
<aap:target id="monitoring-service">
  monitoring:
    image: prom/prometheus:v2.45.0
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    depends_on:
      - gateway
      - auth
      - user
      - order
      - notification
  </aap:target>
